title: Engineering Concept Glossary Poster AI
sourceTitle: Prompt Engineering Concept Glossary Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Concept glossary poster explaining specific concept set variant with readable visual details as a clear AI creation vocabulary map. Subject: specific concept set variant with readable visual details are presented as the core labeled concepts, with bilingual English and Chinese naming preserved where provided. Scene: fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt organizes the terminology into a clean learning poster, technical but accessible, with each concept separated into readable modules. Composition: Vertical or square educational poster with title AI Creation Vocabulary Map, numbered concept blocks, short bilingual labels, connecting lines or modular cards, and clean hierarchy from prompt to context to execution loops. Signature Elements: Preserved prompt engineering concept glossary poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Visual Metaphor: modular AI workflow map where each concept is a labeled control module. Style: Modern concept glossary infographic, AI workflow education poster, crisp typography, structured knowledge-map layout, minimal technical visual language, and high-readability social-share finish. Color Palette: Clean neutral background, black or dark-gray typography, subtle blue and violet technical accents, soft module fills, and high-contrast readable labels. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
